author: Winter, Werner
imprint: Based on data collected by Dhan Prasad Rai.  Preliminary Version.  Kiel: Linguistic Survey of Nepal
title: Materials towards a dictionary of Chamling: I. Chamling-English; II. English-Chamling
notes: Distinct from (1) K. Ebert's Chamling data and (2) Ebert's data on Chamling given to STEDT by BM. * at end of form indicates that form was not taken from word lists compliled by Dhan Prasad Rai.
